title: PAI-CD: A Protocol for Authorial Sovereignty in AI Systems
description: PAI-CD (PAI Constitutional Document; PAI — Personal Authorial Intelligence) is a normative governance framework establishing constitutional constraints for personal AI systems. It specifies deployment-layer governance architecture ensuring authorial sovereignty, consent-based capability control, and provider-independent enforcement. PAI-CD is designed to be reproducible on any AI infrastructure and verifiable independently of any provider.
